hub_subtitle: Business English para Missões Internacionais e Pequenos Negócios

lesson.menu_title: From São Paulo to Milan -- Telling Your Professional Story
lesson.menu_desc: Tell your professional story from past to future, using narrative time linkers to connect the moments of your journey -- 33 slides
lesson.subtitle: Lesson 15 -- Telling Your Professional Story
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Flávia Florêncio Ferreira | Lesson 15 -- Your Professional Story
lesson.grammar_point: narrative discourse markers and time linkers (looking back, looking ahead, as a result)

listenings.text: Good evening. Let me tell you my professional story. Looking back, I started in Sao Paulo with one small idea and a lot of passion. At first, the work was hard, and I had to overcome many problems. Over the years, I reached important milestones. My turning point was my first international mission. As a result, today I lead missions for small businesses. My commitment is strong, and my purpose is clear. Looking ahead, my vision is to reach new markets in Europe. Above all, I want to leave a good legacy. Thank you.

Good evening. Here is one simple tip to tell your professional story. First, look back and start at the beginning. Say, looking back, I started here. Then, describe your trajectory and the milestones on the way. Talk about your turning point, the moment when everything changed. After that, share your vision and your purpose for the future. Say, looking ahead, I want to grow. A good story has a clear journey, from the past to the future. Tell it with passion. Good luck!

extra_audio.text: First, I look back and talk about how I started in Sao Paulo. Then, I describe the turning point in my trajectory. Next, I explain the milestones I reached over the years. After that, I share my vision and my purpose for the future. Finally, I talk about the legacy I want to leave.
